docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ACCOMMODATIONS BY PERSONS WITH DISABILITIES AMD ORDER, FILED BY PLTF. TO BE SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER.
QUALIFYING IMPAIRMENT INCLUDING A STATEMENT WHICH NECESITATES SUCH AN ACCOMODATION.
THE REQUEST FOR ACCOMODATIONS IS GRANTED. THE APPLICANT SATISFIES THE REQUIREMENTS OF THE RULE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NEXTARTS AS TO DEFENDANT SBC CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST FOR ACCOMODATION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PER CRC 989.3(C)(2), THE COURT REQUESTS ADDITIONAL INFORMATION ABOUT THE
ORIGINAL ADA REQUEST FILED IN ADA FOLDER.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SBC CALIFORNIA
REQUEST FOR ACCOMODATIONS BY PERSONS WITH DISABILITIES SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL.
MEDICAL CERTIFICATION ON ADA DEPT. OF VETERANS AFFAIRS ATTACHED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SBC CALIFORNIA CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE DUE TO PLAINTIFF FILING A SPLIT CLAIM. PLAINTIFF FILED A CLAIM AGAINST DEFT FOR BROKEN PHONE LINE 12/3/04 THROUGH 12/7/04. SEE CASE # 811601. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COPY OF ORDER OF DENIAL SENT TO REQUESTING PARTY, ANTHONY IMPERIAL.
